name: Harden Zitadel
description: Post-bootstrap hardening for the YAML-config Zitadel layout: deletes zitadel.init.yaml from the config volume, rewrites the compose command (drops the init.yaml --config, switches start-from-init -> start), sets the bootstrap volume read-only and reduces the healthcheck start_period. Only runs after a successful bootstrap (requires zitadel_project_id output); a no-op for non-Zitadel apps.

commands.name: Harden Zitadel
commands.description: Delete init.yaml, rewrite command, restart compose
